JavaScript right shift operation tests with various operands and conditions.


## Files
- **[11.07.02-001.js](11.07.02-001.js.md)**: Tests the right shift operation in JavaScript by verifying that shifting 20 by 2 results in 5.
- **[11.07.02-002.js](11.07.02-002.js.md)**: Tests the right shift operation with addition in JavaScript.
- **[11.07.02-003.js](11.07.02-003.js.md)**: Tests right shift operation with a string as the shift amount.
- **[11.07.02-004.js](11.07.02-004.js.md)**: Tests right shift operation on an uninitialized variable in JavaScript.
- **[11.07.02-005.js](11.07.02-005.js.md)**: Tests right shift operation on a null value in JavaScript.
- **[11.07.02-006.js](11.07.02-006.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of the right shift operator with a null operand in JavaScript.
- **[11.07.02-007.js](11.07.02-007.js.md)**: Tests the right shift operation with a boolean value in JavaScript.
- **[11.07.02-008.js](11.07.02-008.js.md)**: Tests the right shift operation with a negative shift count in JavaScript.
- **[11.07.02-009.js](11.07.02-009.js.md)**: Tests right shift operation on a negative integer and asserts the result.
